# dma_csr register map

<!-- GENERATED by reggen. Do not edit by hand; edit the YAML spec and regenerate. -->

Control/status registers for the AXI DMA engine.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Data width | 32 bits |
| Address width | 12 bits |
| Base address | 0x000 |

## Registers

| Offset | Name | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0x000 | [CTRL](#ctrl) | 0x00000100 | Global control. |
| 0x004 | [STATUS](#status) | 0x00000000 | Engine status (hardware-driven). |
| 0x008 | [SRC_ADDR](#src_addr) | 0x00000000 | Source byte address (whole-register field). |
| 0x00C | [DST_ADDR](#dst_addr) | 0x00000000 | Destination byte address (whole-register field). |
| 0x010 | [LENGTH](#length) | 0x00000000 | Transfer length in bytes. |
| 0x014 | [INT_EN](#int_en) | 0x00000000 | Interrupt enables. |

### CTRL

**Offset:** 0x000 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000100

Global control.

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | ENABLE | RW | 0x0 | 1 = enable the DMA engine. |
| 1 | RESET | W1S | 0x0 | Write 1 to pulse a soft reset. |
| 2 | DIRECTION | RW | 0x0 |  |
| 11:4 | BURST_LEN | RW | 0x10 | AXI burst length in beats. |

*DIRECTION values:*
- `0` — **MEM_TO_DEV**: Read memory, write device.
- `1` — **DEV_TO_MEM**: Read device, write memory.

### STATUS

**Offset:** 0x004 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Engine status (hardware-driven).

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | BUSY | RO | 0x0 | 1 = transfer in progress. |
| 1 | DONE | W1C | 0x0 | Set by HW on completion; write 1 to clear. |
| 2 | ERROR | W1C | 0x0 | Set by HW on bus error; write 1 to clear. |

### SRC_ADDR

**Offset:** 0x008 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Source byte address (whole-register field).

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 31:0 | SRC_ADDR | RW | 0x0 | Source byte address (whole-register field). |

### DST_ADDR

**Offset:** 0x00C &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Destination byte address (whole-register field).

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 31:0 | DST_ADDR | RW | 0x0 | Destination byte address (whole-register field). |

### LENGTH

**Offset:** 0x010 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Transfer length in bytes.

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 31:0 | LENGTH | RW | 0x0 | Transfer length in bytes. |

### INT_EN

**Offset:** 0x014 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Interrupt enables.

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | DONE_EN | RW | 0x0 |  |
| 1 | ERROR_EN | RW | 0x0 |  |
